title: lathyrus niger subsp. niger
intro: Lathyrus niger subsp. niger, also known as vetchling or black vetch, is a perennial flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Lathyrus niger subsp. niger is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
